headline: TDS Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates on Spectrum Sale Gains
summary: TDS swings to a Q1 profit on spectrum sale gains as fiber expansion and tower growth help offset legacy telecom declines.

headline: AD Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates Despite Site Rental Growth
summary: Array Digital's Q1 revenues jump 93% on tower leasing growth, but earnings and revenues miss estimates as spectrum deals boost profitability.

headline: Paylocity Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: PCTY posts fiscal Q3 earnings beat as revenues climb 10.5% Y/Y, driven by recurring growth, while margins expand and new AI recruiting tools boost offerings.

headline: Can Prairie Operating Deliver an Earnings Beat This Quarter?
summary: Prairie Operating Co. reports Q1 2026 May 14; consensus targets 15 cents EPS on $87.2M revenues after mixed prior-quarter results.

headline: Ariel Appreciation Fund Q1 2026 Performers And Detractors
summary: Ariel Appreciation Fund traded up +1.14% in the quarter, lagging the Russell Midcap Value Index's +3.68% gain and the +1.29% return posted by the Russell Midcap Index. Read more here.
